log: |tier|[Gen 2] Nintendo Cup 2000 No OHKO Stadium2 Strict
|rule|Species Clause: Limit one of each Pokémon
|rule|Sleep Clause Mod: Limit one foe put to sleep
|rule|Freeze Clause Mod: Limit one foe frozen
|rule|HP Percentage Mod: HP is shown in percentages
|-hint|Gen 2 Present has a glitched damage calculation using the secondary types of the Pokemon for the Attacker's Level and Defender's Defense.
